allow: Bash(lsof -ti :3001 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null && echo "killed" || echo "nothing on 3001")

Bash(cd . && \\
sed -i '' "s|from '@fmanager/common/utils'|from '@fmanager/common'|g" \\
  frontend/src/components/AddTransactionModal.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/StatsBar.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/TransactionList.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/TransactionDetailModal.tsx && \\
sed -i '' "s|from '@fmanager/common/types'|from '@fmanager/common'|g" \\
  frontend/src/components/AddTransactionModal.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/StatsBar.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/FilterBar.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/TransactionList.tsx \\
  frontend/src/components/TransactionDetailModal.tsx)
